description: Automatically translate manga ZIP archives to 26 target languages with OCR and optional colorization.
manga-zip-translate-description: Submit manga ZIP URL to translation API, poll for completion, and return translated ZIP download URL.
check-zip-format-description: Validate if a local file or remote URL is a valid ZIP archive by checking magic number signature (PK header).
validate-if-a-local-file-or-remote-url-i: Validate if a local file or remote URL is a valid ZIP archive by checking magic number signature.
local-file-path-or-http-https-url-of-the: Local file path or HTTP/HTTPS URL of the file to validate. Supports file:// scheme, plain paths, and remote URLs.
true-if-the-file-has-valid-zip-signature: True if the file has valid ZIP signature (PK header), false otherwise. Uses magic number validation.
file-size-in-bytes-available-for-both-lo: File size in bytes. Available for both local files and remote URLs (if Content-Length header is present).
absolute-path-to-the-local-zip-file-only: Absolute path to the local ZIP file. Only returned when input is a valid local ZIP file path.
original-url-of-the-remote-zip-file-only: Original URL of the remote ZIP file. Only returned when input is a valid network ZIP URL.
submit-manga-zip-to-oomol-fusion-api-for: Submit manga ZIP to OOMOL Fusion API for text translation, poll for completion, and return translated ZIP URL.
publicly-accessible-url-of-the-manga-zip: Publicly accessible URL of the manga ZIP file to translate. Must be a valid HTTP/HTTPS URL pointing to a ZIP archive containing manga images.
target-language-for-manga-text-translati: Target language for manga text translation. Supports 26 languages including Chinese (Simplified/Traditional), Japanese, Korean, English, and European languages.
enable-colorization-for-manga-images: Enable colorization for manga images. When enabled, black-and-white manga pages will be automatically colorized.
optional-colorization-size-for-image-pro: Optional colorization size for image processing. Specifies the target resolution for colorization. Leave empty for default.
optional-upload-directory-for-translated: Optional upload directory for translated ZIP file. Specifies the directory path for storing the output file. Default: 'task'.
optional-output-filename-for-translated-: Optional output filename for translated ZIP file. Example: 'translated.zip'. Leave empty for auto-generated name.
timeout-in-seconds-for-translation-task-: Translation task timeout (seconds). Default value: 2400 seconds (40 minutes).
interval-in-seconds-between-status-check: Interval in seconds between status check requests during polling. Lower values provide faster feedback but increase API calls. Default: 5s.
maximum-number-of-retry-attempts-for-fai: Maximum number of retry attempts for failed HTTP requests. Applies to both task submission and status polling. Default: 3.
base-delay-in-seconds-between-retry-atte: Base delay in seconds between retry attempts. Actual delay increases exponentially with each retry. Default: 2s.
session-id-for-the-translation-task: Session ID for the translation task. Used to track and query the task status.
task-id-for-the-translation-task: Task ID returned by the translation service.
status-of-the-translation-task: Status of the translation task (e.g., succeeded).
download-url-of-the-translated-manga-zip: Download URL of the translated manga ZIP file. URL is time-limited and may expire.
raw-download-url-of-the-translated-manga: Raw download URL of the translated manga ZIP file without CDN.
object-storage-key-for-the-translated-zi: Object storage key for the translated ZIP file. Can be used for direct storage access.
number-of-images-successfully-translated: Number of images successfully translated in the manga ZIP.
total-number-of-pages-in-the-manga-zip: Total number of pages detected in the manga ZIP.
file-zip-translator-description: Translate local manga ZIP files to target language. Uploads file, validates format, submits for translation, and returns download URL. Best for OOMOL Studio use.
file-zip-translator-path: Local file path to the manga ZIP archive. Use file picker widget to select a ZIP file containing manga images.
file-zip-translator-target-lang: Target language for translation. Supports 26 languages including Chinese, Japanese, Korean, English, and European languages.
file-zip-translator-wait-timeout: Translation task timeout in seconds. Default: 2400s (40 minutes). Increase for large files.
file-zip-translator-colorize: Enable colorization for manga images. When enabled, black-and-white manga pages will be automatically colorized.
file-zip-translator-directory: Optional upload directory for translated ZIP file. Specifies the storage directory path. Default: 'task'.
file-zip-translator-file: Optional output filename for translated ZIP file. Example: 'translated.zip'. Leave empty for auto-generated name.
file-zip-translator-result-zip-url: Download URL of the translated manga ZIP file. Only available when translation completes successfully. URL is time-limited.
file-zip-translator-result-zip-raw-url: Raw download URL of the translated manga ZIP file without CDN acceleration.
file-zip-translator-result-zip-object-ke: Object storage key for the translated ZIP file. Can be used for direct storage access.
file-zip-translator-total-pages: Total number of pages detected in the manga ZIP archive.
url-zip-translator-description: Translate manga ZIP from URL to target language. Validates URL, submits for translation, and returns download URL. Best for web or API integration.
url-zip-translator-url: Publicly accessible URL of the manga ZIP file to translate. Must be a valid HTTP/HTTPS URL pointing to a ZIP archive containing manga images.
url-zip-translator-target-lang: Target language for translation. Supports 26 languages including Chinese, Japanese, Korean, English, and European languages.
url-zip-translator-wait-timeout: Timeout period, in seconds. The default is 2400 seconds (40 minutes).
url-zip-translator-colorize: Enable colorization for manga images. When enabled, black-and-white manga pages will be automatically colorized.
url-zip-translator-directory: Optional upload directory for translated ZIP file. Specifies the storage directory path. Default: 'task'.
url-zip-translator-file: Optional output filename for translated ZIP file. Example: 'translated.zip'. Leave empty for auto-generated name.
url-zip-translator-session-id: Session ID for the translation task. Used to track and query the task status.
url-zip-translator-result-zip-url: Download URL of the translated manga ZIP file. Only available when translation completes successfully. URL is time-limited.
url-zip-translator-result-zip-raw-url: Raw download URL of the translated manga ZIP file without CDN acceleration.
url-zip-translator-result-zip-object-key: Object storage key for the translated ZIP file. Can be used for direct storage access.
url-zip-translator-total-pages: Total number of pages detected in the manga ZIP archive.
translates-text-in-manga-zip-archives-to: Translate the text from the comic ZIP archive into the target language. If it is a URL, a direct request will be made.
local-file-path-to-the-manga-zip-archive: Local file path to the manga ZIP archive. Use file picker widget to select a ZIP file containing manga images.
target-language-for-translation: Target language for translation. Supports 26 languages including Chinese, Japanese, Korean, English, and European languages.
download-url-of-the-translated-manga-zip: Download URL of the translated manga ZIP file. Only available when translation completes successfully. URL is time-limited.
oomol-studio-url-zip-translator: After uploading local files, translation is supported. This is suitable for use in oomol-studio. For web or other platforms, please use url-zip-translator.
key1: Use coloring model; not used by default.
key3: After conversion, if the file name does not end with .zip, .zip will be added.
zip-translated-zip: Optional output file name for the translated ZIP file. For example: 'translated.zip'. Leave blank to auto-generate the file name.
zip-task: Optional directory for uploading the translated ZIP file. Specify the storage directory path for the output file. Default value: 'task'.
key4: Enable comic image coloring. Once enabled, black-and-white comic pages will be automatically colored.
presigned-url-for-accessing-the-uploaded: Presigned URL for accessing the uploaded file (valid for 24 hours)
